concerns.text: FR-008 (Validation) and SC-001 (Null Hypothesis) require schema validation and statistical test logic. Task T008 (Create base data validation schemas) is marked incomplete. Without these schemas, FR-008 cannot be satisfied, and downstream tasks T009, T017, T023, T026, T031, T032 are blocked, leaving the core validation requirement unimplemented.

FR-001 (Data Download), FR-002 (Interpolation), and FR-003 (Anomaly Calc) require the generation of a master dataset. Task T017 (Generate master_dataset.csv) is marked incomplete. This prevents the creation of the primary analysis artifact required for US1, blocking all downstream statistical analysis (US2, US3) and leaving FR-001/002/003 unfulfilled.

FR-004 (Statistical Tests) and SC-001 (Association Strength) require p-value calculation and result framing. Tasks T023 (p-value calculation) and T026 (statistical_results.json generation) are marked incomplete. This leaves the core statistical analysis (US2) unimplemented, failing to satisfy FR-004 and FR-005.

FR-006 (FDR), FR-007 (Sensitivity), and Constitution Principle VII (Null Result Rigor) require robustness reporting and a final pilot report. Tasks T031 (robustness_report.json) and T032 (pilot_report.md) are marked incomplete. This leaves the project without a final deliverable or validation of robustness, violating the requirement for a complete methodology validation pilot.

Plan.md Constraints specify memory usage < 7GB on CPU-only runners. Task T034 (Code cleanup for memory efficiency) is marked incomplete. Without this, the project risks failing the computational feasibility requirement (SC-004) and the plan's explicit performance constraints.

Task T009 references a sample data file `tests/fixtures/sample_earthquake.yaml` for contract testing. This file is not listed in the plan.md project structure or created by any prior task. The task description asserts a failure condition for a missing file that should be provided as a fixture, creating a potential implementation gap for the test itself.
